name: Heatmap
searchText: heatmap heatmap chart component @mantine/charts /charts/heatmap colors data domain enddate firstdayofweek fontsize gap getrectprops gettooltiplabel legendlabels monthlabels monthslabelsheight rectradius rectsize splitmonths startdate tooltipprops weekdaylabels weekdayslabelswidth withlegend withmonthlabels withoutsidedates withtooltip withweekdaylabels

props.name: colors
props.description: Colors array, used to calculate color for each value, by default 4 shades of green colors are used

props.name: data
props.description: Heatmap data, key is date in YYYY-MM-DD format (interpreted as a UTC calendar day)

props.name: domain
props.description: Heatmap domain, array of 2 numbers, min and max values, calculated from data by default

props.name: endDate
props.description: Heatmap end date. Current date by default. Date is normalized to UTC midnight of the intended calendar day.

props.name: firstDayOfWeek
props.description: First day of week, 0 – Sunday, 1 – Monday.

props.name: fontSize
props.description: Font size of month and weekday labels

props.name: gap
props.description: Gap between rects in px

props.name: getRectProps
props.description: Props passed down to each rect depending on its date and associated value

props.name: getTooltipLabel
props.description: A function to generate tooltip label based on the hovered rect date and value, required for the tooltip to be visible

props.name: legendLabels
props.description: Legend labels, array of 2 elements: [min label, max label]

props.name: monthLabels
props.description: Month labels, array of 12 elements, can be used for localization

props.name: monthsLabelsHeight
props.description: Height of month labels row

props.name: rectRadius
props.description: Rect radius in px

props.name: rectSize
props.description: Size of day rect in px

props.name: splitMonths
props.description: If set, inserts a spacer column between months

props.name: startDate
props.description: Heatmap start date. Current date - 1 year by default. Date is normalized to UTC midnight of the intended calendar day.

props.name: tooltipProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Tooltip.Floating component

props.name: weekdayLabels
props.description: Weekday labels, array of 7 elements, can be used for localization

props.name: weekdaysLabelsWidth
props.description: Width of weekday labels column

props.name: withLegend
props.description: If set, legend with color levels is displayed below the heatmap

props.name: withMonthLabels
props.description: If set, month labels are displayed

props.name: withOutsideDates
props.description: If set, trailing dates that do not fall into the given startDate – endDate range are displayed to fill empty space.

props.name: withTooltip
props.description: If set, tooltip is displayed on rect hover

props.name: withWeekdayLabels
props.description: If set, weekday labels are displayed
